title: Two more Gameskraft directors sent to ED custody in money laundering case
description: A Bengaluru court on Saturday remanded two directors of online gaming company Gameskraft to the custody of Enforcement Directorate (ED) in a money laundering case.Principal City Civil and Sessions Court in-charge Judge Shankarappa Nimbanna Kalkani allowed the ED’s remand plea and handed the custody of directors Prithvi Raj Singh and Deepak Singh Ahlawat to ED till May 13.ED's case is based on three FIRs registered in Telangana earlier this year over alleged cheating of users on online rummy plat
